hook_text_english: I compare ChatGPT 5.5 and Claude 4.7 Opus across real tasks using Gemini as judge
full_text_english:
*Get the Claude guide:* https://clickhubspot.com/x8zb

I go step by step to show how I compare ChatGPT GPT 5.5 and Claude 4.7 Opus across real tasks.

I test ChatGPT vs Claude with coding, writing, landing page copy, data analysis, video planning, business strategy, teaching, website copy, code debugging, and app features.

I use Google Gemini as the judge so I am not the one picking the winner. Gemini scores each AI model from 1 to 10, then I add up the results.

This AI model comparison helps show where Claude is better, where ChatGPT is better, and which AI chatbot may be best for your daily work.

Claude does very well with writing, design, landing pages, dashboards, teaching, and clear business-ready outputs. ChatGPT does better in some strategy, debugging, and feature tests. ChatGPT also has more tools, like image generation and custom GPTs.

If you are trying to choose between ChatGPT and Claude, this video gives you a simple look at how both AI tools work in real examples. I also share a free Claude guide to help you get better results with Claude.

00:00:00 Intro
00:00:49 The Setup
00:01:07 Test 1: Build a Mini App
00:03:08 Test 2: YouTube Script
00:04:15 Test 3: Landing Page Copy
00:05:55 Free Claude Guide
00:06:35 Test 4: Data Dashboard
00:08:51 Test 5: Video Storyboard
00:10:23 Test 6: Business Strategy
00:11:09 Test 7: AI as Teacher
00:12:22 Test 8: Website Copy Rewrite
00:13:26 Test 9: Code Debugging
00:13:54 Test 10: Features Showdown
00:16:35 Which One Should You Use
body_summary_english: Comprehensive comparison tests ChatGPT vs Claude across 10 categories including coding, writing, and strategy. Uses Google Gemini as unbiased evaluator scoring each model 1-10.
comments: You should have mentioned the number of tokens used by the models for each category to give a cost perspective
*Get the Claude guide:* https://clickhubspot.com/5wa3

Claude = Second Brain, Assistant, Coding
ChatGPT = Image Generation, Bug Fixing, Deep Research
Gemini = General Questions, Quick (Re)search, Youtube Summaries

I’ve tested both, and ChatGPT 5.5 is still my daily driver. 
Claude is great if you need a pretty landing page or want it to write code for you, but for the marketing automation and strategic work I do, it doesn’t quite cut it.

ChatGPT follows my specific logic and voice better without trying to polish the grit out of the message. 
If I’m not building a site or debugging an app, GPT is the one I’m paying for.

1. Use ChatGPT 5.5 Pro with extended thinking enabled.
2. Do not identify the artificial intelligence model to the judge. Refer to the two submissions only as “Author A” and “Author B.”
3. Use a reasoning model, such as Gemini 3.1 Pro, to evaluate which artificial intelligence output is stronger.

Good effort, but I believe the analysis omits a substantial amount of important information.

Do a Gemini vs Claude 
Chatgpt rank them

Not used clause much, but recently used chatgpt plus subscription with codex for writing html pages containing python scripts and php. Very, very impressed. No hallucinations, no reversions, seems to always do the right thing like it's reading my mind.
T
Thank you for this helpful efforts 🎉
I think a blind evaluation by the model who judges is a better approach than expose the names of the models in the test.
Awesome idea... Gemini, as the referee, watches the fight in the AI ring...

This was a great comparison. I’ve done similar comparisons and gotten similar results. Personally Claude is my main driver these days, and I keep a Perplexity subscription for heavier research and a few other things it does well. Gemini is for really quick low-effort searches. But my subscriptions are for Claude and Perplexity because those actually deliver for the money. 

I don’t find ChatGPT that good, especially compared to Claude.
What we learned was that Gemini has a grudge against ChatGPT.

This is good and I think we'll keep seeing a lot of changes in the landscape. I feel there's still a lot of room for improvement and not specifically on the performance of the models. 
I'd like to see more in-depth comparisons of the user experience and integrations. I feel Claude has done a lot of work on that compared to ChatGPT. Gemini is now embedded in Chrome, which is a big plus.

in research and marketing, you do not pass the data to the subject as you did... you prepare a blind test:
1) do not inform the evaluator about who the writer is... just say Author 1, Author 2
2) change the order of the answers... not always one model first, the other second, but randomly
I mostly use Claude, been this way for a few months now.  Like others, I'd love to see a 3-way with adding Gemini to the mix
I think the background built based on your use could make the difference
You should put Gemini and Claude head to head. I think Gemini writes better, especially in long-form writing.

Problem is, this is YOUR test, and YOUR prompts. So Gemini is evaluating from YOUR perspective. I will try and make one, where Gemini makes all the prompting inc its own and see if the results are the same! Great video though! Good stuff

I use,
gpt for deep research and long chats.
Claude for anything influence code and organize the data.

To actually put this in perspective,the token utilization should have been considered too, the cost of running Claude/ChatGPT are miles different, I switched to Claude but I realized I burn token as fast as a Ferrari compared to other models.
The only reason I would pay for GPT overclouds cloud is ridiculous with their usage limits. I mean, it is just ridiculous.
good video
read book Smart Broke Dumb Rich by Zor Veyl on a flight next to a guy in a suit. he peeked at the cover and looked away fast. that look told me more than any review

Gemini just picked Claude because it was the prettiest. Also because it was a Fast version which is a very small model (3.1 flash lite) so it could have a bias in its training data that Claude > Chatgpt. 

You should have just said to tell which is better out of two responses without telling if its from ChatGPT or Claude

I use char GPT more because the token usage is so efficient in codex... I love cluade for it elegance and human like interactions, it seems to know when to cut right to the point and when to elaborate more. Chat GPT on the other hand is know for its context bloat and over explaining. But I think I getter bang for my buck overall with chat GPT
Mine is Claude
Desspseek v4 flash and pro Claude console with Deepseek integration and manus.
Claude always problems with credits. Chatgpt is much better, but I am not coding
You should not say in the prompt this is from which model output

It still is biased as Gemini is also trained on people's opinions and most would rate Claude better. So do not tell Gemini about Claude and chatgpt. Call it model 1 and model 2.

Also Gemini is a judge, but what we see, we can see chatgpt is better from what we need. Ask yourself. Claude also has IQ issue. It leans towards user. It does no independent thinking, just searches and selects what's prevalent among scholars and then selects something from it, but found that chatgpt gives some new ideas as well. Also in philosophy and religion, it won't bring anything new when chatgpt does. In code Claude gives good apps but gpt is superior in writing good code, so as an engineer I have now found chatgpt to be more original and Claude a copy cat and a follower. A humble opinion.

Gemini might be biased in this case. Google invested in Claude recently or is about to do so, which could introduce bias. It would have been better if you made the comparison without referencing Claude or ChatGPT. Just label them as Model 1 and Model 2 when sending them to Gemini; this will result in a less biased evaluation.

Please make a video

Many of students use plus

I think this video should be titled why I love Claude, the AI it self will tell you no one AI is a one all do all, I use all and the one you say is the best is not, don’t get me wrong Claude is amazing but not perfect
GPT is getting very sensored and i hate how they deal with your data
Sorry but the best model is Gemini 3.1 pro.

Yeah I just can’t over how ChatGPT is too much of a yes man. It agrees with the user way too much.
I cancelled my ChatGPT subscription and switched to Claude full time for the moment. I’m sure when Gemini releases a newer model next week we shall see then.
The best one is Opus 4.6

dest_immediate: Link in post → Claude comparison guide
title: ChatGPT VS Claude - The Ultimate Test
caption:
*Get the Claude guide:* https://clickhubspot.com/x8zb

I go step by step to show how I compare ChatGPT GPT 5.5 and Claude 4.7 Opus across real tasks.

I test ChatGPT vs Claude with coding, writing, landing page copy, data analysis, video planning, business strategy, teaching, website copy, code debugging, and app features.

I use Google Gemini as the judge so I am not the one picking the winner. Gemini scores each AI model from 1 to 10, then I add up the results.

This AI model comparison helps show where Claude is better, where ChatGPT is better, and which AI chatbot may be best for your daily work.

Claude does very well with writing, design, landing pages, dashboards, teaching, and clear business-ready outputs. ChatGPT does better in some strategy, debugging, and feature tests. ChatGPT also has more tools, like image generation and custom GPTs.

If you are trying to choose between ChatGPT and Claude, this video gives you a simple look at how both AI tools work in real examples. I also share a free Claude guide to help you get better results with Claude.

00:00:49 The Setup

transcript: The two biggest AI models and AI chatbots right now are ChatGPT with GPT-5.5 model and Claude with the Claude 4.7 Opus model. But, which one is actually better? If you had to pick one model to use and actually pay for, which one is it going to be? Well, to find out, I'm going to put these two a head-to-head test across 10 real-world examples. I'm going to cover coding, writing, landing page design, business strategy, data analysis, teaching, video planning, and more in this one video. And to keep them fair, I'm not going to be the judge in this video. I'm actually going to use another AI model, Google Gemini in this case, to be the judge. And Google Gemini will give it a score from 1 to 10 for each prompt, and then we'll add it up at the end of the video to see which model actually wins this head-to-head battle. On the left side, I have Claude, and I have adaptive thinking turned on. That's going to let it think longer and give you the best results. So, if you want the very best auto Claude, this is what you want to have turned on with the Opus model turned on. Now, I'm using the paid version for both of these here. And for ChatGPT, the model that is the best model right now is called 5.5, and I'm using the thinking and the extended version of the thinking model. The first prompt is to create a mini app, and I'm actually going to use it right inside of chat. Both of these actually have a different part of the app that is designed just for coding. In the Claude case, it's called Claude code. You need the desktop app to use it. And for ChatGPT, it's called ChatGPT Codex. I'm going to keep that for a separate video. Right now, I just want to use the version that most people get with the website here where they're using the model. Okay, so we have our version from Claude here on the left side, ChatGPT on the right side. They both followed my prompt. My prompt was actually to make it very minimalistic. We'll do a follow-up prompt here to try to make it a little bit more in-depth. But, overall, they do a good job here adding something. So, let's see. Make a video. Yeah, they're both good at marking it as done. That works well with ChatGPT. Delete works. And it's very minimalistic. So, let me actually try to do a follow-up. But I'm not going to be the judge. I just want to do a quick follow-up here. I'm going to ask both of these to make something a lot more professional that I could actually sell if I was selling a habit tracker. And then we'll download that one page and we'll have Gemini give it a score. Okay, our new version looks a whole lot better here. With Claude, by the way, I noticed a new Opus model always picks the same kind of design. So, he always picks the same kind of font. ChatGPT is more colorful and it usually has more variety to its design. Claude, if you don't tell it specifically what you want out of your design, it will kind of give you the same type of design. I did make a different video about Claude design and how to change that in your prompt so you get different varieties. But let's see what Gemini says here. Okay, Gemini thinks Claude wins in every single category from visual design to features here. This is the second version, our final version. And the score we got ChatGPT at 7.2 out of 10, Claude at 9.4 out of 10 on this very first test. Okay, so for the second one, when you're picking an AI model, you want it to be good and natural at writing and be able to follow your prompt very closely, to follow your tone and the way you would naturally sound sometimes, right? So, I'm going to use Claude to write a 60-second YouTube script for this video. I'm going to ask it to keep the tone casual, clear, energetic, avoid hype words. Same thing with ChatGPT. I think they actually did a pretty good job here. I think I'll pick Claude if I was choosing the winner here. But let's have Gemini be the judge again. Okay, again Claude comes out the winner here. Nines and 10 across the board. ChatGPT got as low as a six her
